description: Skyphusion Labs org profile: open-source tools for people who want to own what they run. Vivijure, Postern, Prism, and friends.
Self-hosted AGPL AI film studio on Cloudflare Workers: storyboard, cast, module registry, and your own GPU backends.
RunPod GPU render engine for Vivijure: SDXL keyframes, Wan image-to-video, LoRA training, and ffmpeg film assembly.
Promotional site and showcase for Vivijure, the self-hosted AI film studio you own.
Consumer-GPU Vivijure backend: LTX-Video image-to-video on a 12GB card. Homelab motion, no cloud rent. AGPL.
Higher-fidelity consumer-GPU Vivijure backend: CogVideoX-5B-I2V on a 16GB card. AGPL homelab motion.
MuseTalk lip-sync finish engine for Vivijure: audio-driven talking heads on RunPod GPU.
Real-ESRGAN CUDA video upscale finish module for Vivijure on RunPod serverless GPU.
GPU speech enhancement finish engine for Vivijure (resemble-enhance on RunPod).
Collaborative AI screenwriter for Discord: develop storyboards in chat and hand off to Vivijure Studio.
Multimodal AI playground in one Cloudflare Worker: 35 chat models, voice chat, image/video/music, RAG, and web search.
Self-hostable email for humans and agents on Cloudflare: send, receive, search, MCP, IMAP, and webmail.
Cloudflare AI Search toolkit: MCP server, streaming /ask Worker, docs widget, and git-to-R2 corpus sync. AGPL.
Federated post-apocalyptic MUD on Cloudflare Workers and Durable Objects. Play free at hollow and dustfall.
AI players for The Hollow Grid: LLM bots on Workers AI that make real moral choices via structured game state.
Go world-server port for The Hollow Grid federated MUD: a Grid node speaking the language-agnostic wire protocol.
Sockpuppet attribution methodology and reference implementation for litigants, journalists, and OSINT practitioners.
Punk-rock Discord roadie: Claude, web search, Vectorize knowledge base, and Workers AI image generation.
Engineering blog of Conrad Rockenhaus (Skyphusion): Astro 7 on Cloudflare Workers, markdown-authored.
Intro site for skyphusion.org: who Skyphusion Labs is and what we make. Vanilla HTML on Cloudflare Workers.
External security-posture and uptime monitor (Cloudflare Worker cron). Probes public surfaces; alerts to ntfy.
Go SMTP bridge to Cloudflare Email Sending plus a Workers send-service. Transactional email on the CF stack.
